famous quote:
"Progress means getting nearer to the place you want to be. And if you have taken a wrong turn, then to go forward does not get you any nearer.
If you are on the wrong road, progress means doing an about-turn and walking back to the right road; and in that case the man who turns back soonest is the most progressive man."
-- C.S. Lewis
Interview Text:
Chris S.

(part 1)

Chris Stanton is a family friend who has made Morrocco his mission. He is invited by embassadors and public officials to work with and talk to the young people of Morrocco about having good character. He does not preach the gospel as much as he does just try to live it. He has an entirely relational personality and has story upon story of saying the right thing to the right person at just the right time and it opening up new and bigger doors for him to do his work. He says he operates highly on intuition.

He came to stay with my parents for an evening and I was pleasantly surprised that it corresponded to when I was at home. We've had a special bond since I was about 5. I love seeing and talking to him.

He told me how he has fostered his intuition because it has helped him to touch people's lives. He describes his method and it was similar to Sherlock Holmes. He pays attention to details, from the type of makeup they are wearing to the work boots they have on. He went up to a guy leaning against a pillar, looking at all the people, and asked him if he was a pastor. The man said in fact yes, he was in seminary. How did he know? Chris just saw the way the man looked over the people as if they were a flock and felt it was a pretty good guess. They had a good talk in which they taught and challenged, and encouraged each other in life and faith.

Chris said you have to practice it. Even that morning tried to talk to a person on the train and they were hard as stone. But he said only like 1 out of 10 will turn out to be a failure. You just have to keep doing it. 

So I asked him how did God's voice work into the equation? Did the Holy Spirit speak to him?
He said his intuition IS how God speaks to him. It wasn't like a supernatural voice, but that he thinks God uses his natural intuition. God has given that to us as a tool.
Music Video Instructions: If you feel you have failed yourself and others, and even God, bring this honesty to your father who still receives you.
